name: Preparedness Framework
description: OpenAI's Preparedness Framework — defines how OpenAI evaluates and responds to dangerous AI capabilities. Identifies four tracked risk categories (cybersecurity, CBRN, persuasion, model autonomy) and capability thresholds with associated safety measures.
relationToAISecurity: Direct AI-safety capability-tier governance framework; companion to Google DeepMind FSF and Anthropic RSP.
